The '''''Rhodi's Silence''''' was [[Nas Ghent]]'s personal freighter which he used for high risk smuggling missions. The ''Silence'' was "silenced" when [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] personally took down Ghent to recruit him to train a [[Black Eight Squadron|personal squadron]] for Vader's use.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|21|Walking the Path That's Given}}
